title: Minnesota: Minnesota Consumer Data Privacy Act (MCDPA) deletion & opt-out
summary: Minnesota residents can request deletion of the personal data a business holds and opt out of its sale and targeted advertising, including through a recognized universal opt-out signal. Minnesota also adds rights around profiling — to question the result of a profiling decision and learn the reasons behind it. The MCDPA took effect on July 31, 2025.
disclaimer: General information, not legal advice, and not yet independently reviewed — verify the current process and your eligibility before relying on it.
